Agenda Center

View current agendas and minutes for all boards and commissions. Previous years' agendas and minutes can be found in the Document Center. Adobe Reader may be required to view some documents.

Contact Us

  1. Tiburon Town Hall
    1505 Tiburon Boulevard
    Tiburon, CA 94920
    Phone: 415-435-7373

  1. Hours:
    Administration: 8:30 a.m. - 5:00 p.m.
    Planning: 8:00 a.m. - 4:00 p.m.
    Building: 8:00 a.m. - 4:00 p.m.
    Public Works: 8:00 a.m. - 4:00 p.m.
    Town Hall is closed on Fridays
